texto: I really wanted to make the worst thing: the thing that even people who liked bad, terrible music wouldn't like - the stuff that people would ignore, always. Something really, really stupid. Something that is destined for failure.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ariel Pink: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I really wanted to make the worst thing: the thing that even people who liked bad, terrible music…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, stupid pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de stupid e people.

texto: That's one thing I don't think people consider nowadays. They want to believe in the importance of marriage, boil it down to just a signature on a legal document. But that's exactly what it is. If not, why not just get married without one?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ariel Pink que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “That's one thing I don't think people consider nowadays. They want to believe in the importance o…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, marriage, believe, com foco em casamento e believe.
